items.title: prompts.chat
items.summary: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
items.summary_cn: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT提示。分享、发现和收集社区提示。免费开源--为您的组织提供完全隐私的自助出租服务。
items.comment: Meta/Llama系又放大招，社区狂欢，不过实际部署成本您考虑过吗？

items.title: LLMs-from-scratch
items.summary: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step
items.summary_cn: 在PyTorch中从头开始逐步实现类似ChatGPT的LLM
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: Real-time fall detection based on vision for low-power edge platforms
items.title_cn: 基于视觉的低功耗边缘平台实时跌落检测
items.summary: Falling detection is vital for elderly care and intelligent surveillance; however, prevailing vision-based approaches predominantly frame it as static pose classification or discrete temporal pattern matching, fundamentally overlooking the instability dynamics of the human support system. This paper...
items.summary_cn: 跌倒检测对于老年护理和智能监控至关重要；然而，流行的基于视觉的方法主要将其定义为静态姿态分类或离散时间模式匹配，从根本上忽略了人类支持系统的不稳定动态。...
items.comment: 研究成果发布，理论很美好，落地才知道真假，保持审慎乐观。

items.title: MemOps: Benchmarking Lifecycle Memory Operations in Long-Horizon Conversations
items.title_cn: MemOps ：对长期对话中的生命周期内存操作进行基准测试
items.summary: Long-term memory has become a foundational capability for LLM-based agents that accompany users across extended, multi-session interactions. Existing benchmarks, however, evaluate such memory almost exclusively through downstream question answering, scoring only the correctness of a final answer. Th...
items.summary_cn: 长期记忆已成为基于LLM的客服代表的基础能力，可陪伴用户进行长时间、多会话的互动。然而，现有的基准几乎完全通过下游问答来评估这种记忆，只对最终答案的正确性进行评分。...
items.comment: 基准测试成绩亮眼，但测试集和实际场景是两码事，别被数字忽悠。

items.title: UR-VC: Unsupervised Robotic Value Correction for Time-Derived Progress Proxies
items.title_cn: UR-VC ：时间衍生进度代理的无监督机器人值校正
items.summary: Modern robot learning systems increasingly rely on dense progress or value signals to evaluate intermediate states, guide policy learning, and detect task completion, making the quality of these signals critical. Since such dense labels are rarely available at scale, normalized time within a demonst...
items.summary_cn: 现代机器人学习系统越来越依赖于密集的进展或价值信号来评估中间状态、指导策略学习和检测任务完成，使得这些信号的质量至关重要。由于这种密集的标签很少大规模提供，演示内的标准化时间...
items.comment: AI领域新动态，保持关注，别被营销号带节奏。

items.title: Gemini 1.5 Flash - Google's Fast Model

items.summary_cn: 谷歌发布了Gemini 1.5 Flash ，以实现更快的推理和更低的成本。
items.comment: 又是一个'史上最强'，基准测试刷得飞起，实际应用场景待检验。

items.title: AI Regulation Updates - EU AI Act Implementation

items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。
